chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-425 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objection. For orders on M.A No.2465/19. For hearing of main case. 18-04-2019. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General a/w ASI of PS Sakrand (Investigating Officer). = Petitioner No.1 is present in Person. Her statement has been recorded by Investigating Officer of the case disclosing that she has contracted marriage with one Abdul Rehman (petitioner No.2) out of her own freewill and choice and the FIR registered by her father is false and fabricated as she has not been abducted by anyone including her husband and his relatives. The petitioner No.1 present in court has reiterated the said facts before the court. I.O of the case submits that he will dispose of the case under `C` class in the light of statement of petitioner No.1 and would submit such report before the concerned Civil Judge / Judicial Magistrate. Let such report be submitted before the concerned Civil Judge / Judicial Magistrate who thereupon shall pass an appropriate order in accordance with law disposing of the case as recommended. The petitioners are satisfied and seek disposal of this petition. Accordingly, the instant petition in the terms as stated above stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE *Fahad Memon*
